hook: Date two is often where effort starts to matter more than novelty.
body: At that point, follow-through, curiosity, and willingness to keep building become more revealing than first-impression sparkle alone.

hook: Some men stay fixated on whether the second date feels as exciting as the first rather than whether the bond is getting stronger.
body: Look for deepening, not just repeating. At that point, follow-through, curiosity, and willingness to keep building become more revealing than first-impression sparkle alone.

hook: Look for deepening, not just repeating.
body: A second date that feels calmer but more connected may actually be a stronger sign than one that simply re-creates the same rush.

body: On the second date, watch for whether the interaction is becoming more mutual and more real.
